name: investigative-report-generation-v1
description: Full investigative journalism pipeline: actor mapping, timeline reconstruction, evidence chain assembly, impact assessment, report generation, editorial handoff or auto-publish.

steps.name: actor-mapping
steps.prompt_template: ACTOR MAPPING phase for cluster: {{input.cluster_id}}. Brief: {{input.investigator_brief}}. Claim IDs: {{input.claim_ids}}. Map all actors: people, organisations, domains, social accounts. Use browser-use for corporate registry, WHOIS, social graph lookups. Cross-reference with ontology Actor nodes. Return actor_network JSON with relationship edges.

steps.name: timeline-reconstruction
steps.prompt_template: TIMELINE RECONSTRUCTION for cluster {{input.cluster_id}}. Actor network: {{actor_network}}. Claims: {{input.claim_ids}}. Reconstruct chronological sequence: first appearance, amplification nodes, mainstream pickup. Identify patient-zero origin. Flag if narrative was seeded before the real-world event it references. Return timeline JSON array.

steps.name: evidence-chain-assembly
steps.prompt_template: Retrieve full provenance chains for all claims in cluster {{input.cluster_id}}: {{input.claim_ids}}. Export chain-of-evidence for each. Filter: only include evidence with confidence >= 0.75. Flag gaps as [UNVERIFIED - REQUIRES HUMAN REPORTER]. Return assembled evidence_appendix JSON.

steps.name: impact-assessment
steps.prompt_template: IMPACT ASSESSMENT for campaign cluster {{input.cluster_id}}. Timeline: {{timeline}}. Actor network: {{actor_network}}. Estimate: total audience reach, most viral amplification nodes, real-world harm potential (elections, public health, ethnic tensions, financial markets). Source registry credibility context for all domains involved. Return impact_assessment JSON.

steps.name: report-synthesis
steps.prompt_template: Generate full investigation report for cluster {{input.cluster_id}}. Actor network: {{actor_network}}. Timeline: {{timeline}}. Evidence appendix: {{evidence_appendix}}. Impact assessment: {{impact_assessment}}. Write report with: Executive Summary, Key Findings, Actor Network, Timeline, Evidence Appendix, Gaps & Limitations, Recommended Actions. Save DOCX and JSON to output/investigations/{{input.cluster_id}}/. Return report summary and file paths.

steps.name: editorial-routing
steps.prompt_template: Route investigation report for cluster {{input.cluster_id}}. Report: {{investigation_report}}. Impact: {{impact_assessment}}. If harm_potential=high AND evidence_gaps=[] → auto-publish. If evidence_gaps present → create human-reporter handoff brief. If harm_potential=critical → trigger Tier 3 accountability (regulator alert + phone outreach). Execute appropriate action.
